root.sql:
select '(' || trim(sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id) || ') ' || sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_name , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name , sc_acc_m_ucf_account_type.account_type_name , case when sc_acc_m_account_master.account_type_id = '3' then 'แสดง' else '' end as fin_bud_show , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id , ' ' as project_code , ' ' as cost_center_code , ' ' as account_balance , ( select sc_acc_m_account_constant.beginning_of_account from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) as beginning_of_account ,
(case when sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'DR' then coalesce( ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_begin.balance_begin FROM sc_acc_m_account_begin , sc_acc_m_account_constant WHERE sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_year = sc_acc_m_account_constant.present_account_year AND sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) , 0 ) else null end ) as balance_begin_dr ,
(case when sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'CR' then coalesce( ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_begin.balance_begin FROM sc_acc_m_account_begin , sc_acc_m_account_constant WHERE sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_year = sc_acc_m_account_constant.present_account_year AND sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) , 0 ) else null end ) as balance_begin_cr , (case when sc_acc_m_account_master.cancel_status = '1' then 'ปิดใช้งาน' else 'ใช้งาน' end) as account_status , ' ' as delete_account_status , ' ' as entry_date , ' ' as entry_id
from sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_type where sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_type_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_type.account_type_id /*WHERE*/
